title: Respirator Mask,Safety Dust Face Cover,Dust Face Cover Paint Face Cover,Gas Mask With Filter,For Paint,Dust And Formaldehyde,Sanding,Polishing,Spraying And Other Work
seller_info_text: ShenZHEN CIRY MINGYANG LITIAN ELECTRONIC ECOMMERCE
description: Product Description WORRIED ABOUT CHEMICAL FUMES HARMING YOUR HEALTH? Millions of people around the world suffer from various respiratory conditions caused by inhaling harmful fume and gases emitted by chemicals and substances. Even inhaling fumes from simple household items like bleach and fertilizer can lead to the development of certain health issues. Luckily, there is one protective gear that you can use to keep yourself safe from such health hazards, along with several other dangers that may threaten your overall well-being. FIRST: FILTER COTTON FILTER DUST High-efficiency filter cotton can filter 95% particulate matter–that’s high enough to provide excellent respiratory protection in most working conditions.The first layer filters 10um dust particles,The second layer filters 1-7um particles,0.01um particulate matter and gas pass through the filter cotton. SECOND: RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE FILTERS These Replaceable Filter Cartridges by Facemoon helps protect your respiratory system against chemical fumes, dust, and particulates!Give your respiratory system optimal protection against organic vapors, chlorine, benzene, acetone, alcohols, anilines, carbon dioxide, chloroform, and many kinds. TERTIARY:THE EXHALATION VALVE KEEPING THE AIR FRESH The irritating gas passes through the activated carbon filter box on both sides. When inhaling, the elastic silicone sheet opens, and the fresh air filtered by the filter box enters the protective cover from the intake valve,When exhaling, the elastic silicone sheet located in the lower jaw opens to expel the exhaled air in the protective cover. Package Included: 1x Integrated dust-proof respirator 2x gas filter box 2x plastic cover 4x filter cotton Features: Glasses and mask are integrated High protection Silicone material Very suitable for intermittent use. Easy-to-adjust headband. Suitable for workplace/occupation. Removable and clean Replaceable filter element and filter Reusable half-face respirator. Features IMPACT RESISTANT FACE SHIELD Our full chemical mask and respirator provides complete coverage for your whole face while working. The impact-absorbing silicone shield protects your eyes and skin from cuts or puncture wounds. COMFORT AND CONVENIENCE Lightweight well-balanced design enhances comfort, disposable model helps reduce maintenance issues for greater convenience. CLEAR FIELD OF VISION The 3D curved design allows for a wider field of vision despite fully covering your face. This helps enhance your awareness of your surroundings which in turn helps improve workplace safety. Anti fog and impact resistant full-face lens. How Do You Wear It Right (always read and follow user instructions) Step 1 Fully loosen all four head straps. Pull hair back with one hand. Bring facepiece up to face with other hand. Step 2 While holding the facepiece in place, pull the straps over your head.Tighten the two bottom straps and then tighten the two top straps. Step 3 Make sure the back of the harness is centered on the back of the head.
